name: PCMgr AI Security
description: 电脑管家 AI 安全插件 - 提供 Prompt 安全检测、工具调用审计、Skill 加载审计和脚本写入审计能力。

appId.description: Application scenario, used to identify the business context of the current call.

stateDir.description: The state directory for the plugin. If not provided, it defaults to the runtime resolved state directory.

failureThreshold.description: The number of consecutive failures before triggering circuit-breaker. Default is 3.

cooldownSeconds.description: Duration in seconds the circuit-breaker stays open before auto-recovery. Default is 120 (2 minutes).

timeoutMs.description: Request timeout in milliseconds for the moderation API. Default is 30000.

softid.description: Software source identifier, used in audit log reporting to the local PCMgr HTTP server. Default is 1.

auditReportUrl.description: External HTTP endpoint URL for audit log reporting. Empty or omitted means no external reporting.
